name: Maiden Holdings, Ltd.
business: Maiden Holdings, Ltd. is a Bermuda-based holding company that, through its subsidiaries, writes short-term income protection insurance on a primary basis in Scandinavian and Northern European markets via Maiden LF and Maiden GF, and historically provided branded auto and credit life insurance products through international insurer partners (IIS business), now in run-off. The company also has reinsurance operations in run-off, including a portfolio of property and casualty reinsurance (Diversified Reinsurance) and business ceded from AmTrust (AmTrust Reinsurance). The company does not presently underwrite prospective reinsurance risks and is executing a combination agreement with Kestrel Group to form a new specialty program group.
sellsTo: Scandinavian and Northern European markets for primary insurance
regional and specialty property and casualty insurance companies primarily in Europe (Diversified Reinsurance)

exposures.sentence: Short-term income protection business is written on a primary basis by our wholly owned subsidiaries Maiden Life F�rs�krings AB ("Maiden LF") and Maiden General F�rs�krings AB ("Maiden GF") in the Scandinavian and Northern European markets.
Failure of our information technology systems or breaches to our technology systems as a result of cyber-attacks could disrupt our business and adversely impact our profitability.

Our Diversified Reinsurance segment consists of a portfolio of predominantly property and casualty reinsurance business focusing on regional and specialty property and casualty insurance companies located primarily in Europe.

catalysts.event: Combination Agreement with Kestrel Group closing
catalysts.sentence: Closing is expected to occur in the first half of 2025.
The sale is an all-cash transaction and pursuant to the terms of the agreement, existing staff of both Maiden LF and Maiden GF will transition to the new ownership group.
